description: Qwen-Image-Edit 2509 with 3 reference images — compose a scene from character + location + prop references
prompt_guide: Write a composition instruction that tells the model how to combine the three reference images into one scene. Example: 'Place the character from image 1 inside the environment from image 2, holding the prop from image 3, preserving each subject's identity and style.' Reference images by role (character, location, prop) when it clarifies. Keep instructions concise. CRITICAL: never ask for readable text, typography, logos, or lettering — treat icons as silhouettes, not lettered labels.
